competitors.name: Marker
competitors.pricing: Free / Open Source (optional LLM costs with --use_llm)
competitors.keyDifference: General-purpose multi-format converter optimized for throughput; lacks specific image embedding and TOC cleanup focus
competitors.notes: 19K+ GitHub stars. Surya OCR. ~25 pages/sec on H100. Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, EPUB.

competitors.name: Docling (IBM Research)
competitors.pricing: Free / Open Source; Apify hosted $4/mo + usage
competitors.keyDifference: Enterprise RAG pipeline focus with structured DoclingDocument format; heavier than Pdf2Markdown's documentation-focused approach
competitors.notes: 20K+ stars. Base64 image embedding. LlamaIndex/LangChain integration. Semantic hierarchy preservation.

competitors.name: MinerU (OpenDataLab)
competitors.keyDifference: CJK and complex layout specialist; Pdf2Markdown targets Western technical documentation with image embedding and TOC
competitors.notes: 30K+ stars (most popular). PaddleOCR. Diverse hardware support including Chinese accelerators.

competitors.name: MarkPDFDown
competitors.pricing: Free / Open Source (LLM API costs apply per page)
competitors.keyDifference: Requires external LLM APIs for core conversion; Pdf2Markdown works without LLM dependency
competitors.notes: Multimodal LLM-based. Batch processing + Docker. Page range selection. OpenAI/OpenRouter models.

competitors.name: DescribePDF
competitors.keyDifference: Generates page descriptions, not structural Markdown conversion; different use case than Pdf2Markdown
competitors.notes: Vision-Language Model based. Web UI + CLI. Local Ollama support. Best for catalogs and scanned PDFs.

competitors.name: PyMuPDF4LLM
competitors.keyDifference: Python library for programmatic LLM pipeline use; Pdf2Markdown is a standalone tool with image embedding and TOC cleanup
competitors.notes: v0.3.4 (Feb 2026). Multi-column support. Image extraction. Intelligent structure detection.

competitors.name: pdfmd
competitors.keyDifference: Targets note-taking workflows (Obsidian); Pdf2Markdown targets technical documentation with embedded images
competitors.notes: Privacy-first. Desktop GUI + CLI. Heading detection. Header/footer removal. OCR support.
